82	def _image_to_data_uri(rel_url: str) -> str | None:
83	    filename = rel_url.rsplit("/", 1)[-1]
84	    stem = filename.rsplit(".", 1)[0]
85	    mod_path = _UPLOADS_DIR / f"{stem}_mod.webp"
86	    if not mod_path.is_file():
87	        return None
88	    try:
89	        b64 = base64.b64encode(mod_path.read_bytes()).decode()
90	        return f"data:image/webp;base64,{b64}"
91	    except Exception:
92	        logger.exception("Failed to read moderation image: %s", mod_path)
93	        return None

96	def _video_mod_frames(rel_url: str) -> list[str]:
97	    filename = rel_url.rsplit("/", 1)[-1]
98	    stem = filename.rsplit(".", 1)[0]
99	    uris = []
100	    for i in range(3):
101	        path = _UPLOADS_DIR / f"{stem}_mod{i}.webp"
102	        if path.is_file():
103	            try:
104	                b64 = base64.b64encode(path.read_bytes()).decode()
105	                uris.append(f"data:image/webp;base64,{b64}")
106	            except Exception:

112	_OG_RE = re.compile(
113	    r'<meta\s+(?:property|name)=["\']og:(\w+)["\']\s+content=["\']([^"\']*)["\']',

115	)
116	_OG_RE2 = re.compile(
117	    r'<meta\s+content=["\']([^"\']*?)["\']\s+(?:property|name)=["\']og:(\w+)["\']',

141	async def _is_safe_preview_url(url: str) -> bool:
142	    parsed = urlparse(url)
143	    if parsed.scheme not in ("http", "https"):
144	        return False
145	    hostname = parsed.hostname
146	    if not hostname:
147	        return False
148	    if (
149	        hostname in ("localhost",)
150	        or hostname.endswith(".local")
151	        or hostname.endswith(".internal")
152	    ):
153	        return False
154	    try:
155	        infos = await asyncio.to_thread(socket.getaddrinfo, hostname, None)
156	        for family, _, _, _, sockaddr in infos:
157	            addr = ipaddress.ip_address(sockaddr[0])
158	            if (
159	                addr.is_private
160	                or addr.is_loopback
161	                or addr.is_link_local
162	                or addr.is_reserved
163	            ):
164	                return False
165	    except (socket.gaierror, ValueError):
166	        return False
167	    return True

170	async def _resolve_safe_ip(hostname: str) -> str | None:
171	    try:
172	        infos = await asyncio.to_thread(socket.getaddrinfo, hostname, None)
173	    except (socket.gaierror, ValueError):
174	        return None
175	    safe = []
176	    for _family, _, _, _, sockaddr in infos:
177	        try:
178	            addr = ipaddress.ip_address(sockaddr[0])
179	        except ValueError:
180	            return None
181	        if (
182	            addr.is_private
183	            or addr.is_loopback
184	            or addr.is_link_local
185	            or addr.is_reserved
186	            or addr.is_multicast
187	            or addr.is_unspecified
188	        ):
189	            return None
190	        safe.append(sockaddr[0])
191	    return safe[0] if safe else None

194	async def _pinned_preview_get(client, url: str, headers: dict):
195	    # Resolve + validate the host, then connect to the validated IP literal with
196	    # Host header + TLS SNI preserved. The OS never re-resolves, so the address
197	    # can't be rebound to an internal/metadata target between check and connect
198	    # (SSRF DNS-rebinding TOCTOU).
199	    parsed = urlparse(url)
200	    if parsed.scheme not in ("http", "https"):
201	        return None
202	    host = parsed.hostname
203	    if (
204	        not host
205	        or host == "localhost"
206	        or host.endswith(".local")
207	        or host.endswith(".internal")
208	    ):
209	        return None
210	    ip = await _resolve_safe_ip(host)
211	    if not ip:
212	        return None
213	    port = parsed.port or (443 if parsed.scheme == "https" else 80)
214	    ip_host = f"[{ip}]" if ":" in ip else ip
215	    path = parsed.path or "/"
216	    if parsed.query:
217	        path += "?" + parsed.query
218	    pinned_url = f"{parsed.scheme}://{ip_host}:{port}{path}"
219	    req_headers = dict(headers)
220	    req_headers["Host"] = host if port in (80, 443) else f"{host}:{port}"
221	    return await asyncio.wait_for(
222	        client.get(
223	            pinned_url,
224	            headers=req_headers,
225	            follow_redirects=False,
226	            extensions={"sni_hostname": host},
227	        ),
228	        timeout=3.0,
229	    )

232	async def _fetch_link_preview(url: str) -> dict | None:
233	    if not await _is_safe_preview_url(url):
234	        return None
235	    try:
236	        from chat_moderation import _get_http_client
237	
238	        client = _get_http_client()
239	        parsed = urlparse(url)
240	        oembed_base = _OEMBED_HOSTS.get(parsed.netloc)
241	        if oembed_base:
242	            return await _fetch_oembed_preview(client, url, oembed_base)
243	        return await _fetch_og_preview(client, url)
244	    except Exception:
245	        logger.debug("Link preview fetch failed for %s", url[:60])
246	        return None

249	async def _fetch_oembed_preview(client, url: str, oembed_base: str) -> dict | None:
250	    from urllib.parse import quote
251	
252	    resp = await asyncio.wait_for(
253	        client.get(oembed_base + quote(url, safe=""), follow_redirects=True),
254	        timeout=3.0,
255	    )
256	    if resp.status_code != 200:
257	        return None
258	    data = resp.json()
259	    title = data.get("title", "")
260	    if not title:
261	        return None
262	    image = data.get("thumbnail_url", "")
263	    if image and "ytimg.com" in image:
264	        image = re.sub(r"/[a-z]*default\.jpg", "/hq720.jpg", image)
265	    return {
266	        "url": url,
267	        "title": title[:200],
268	        "description": data.get("author_name", ""),
269	        "image": image,
270	        "domain": data.get("provider_name", urlparse(url).netloc),
271	    }

274	async def _fetch_og_preview(client, url: str) -> dict | None:
275	    _og_headers = {
276	        "User-Agent": "Mozilla/5.0 (compatible; StoneCompanionBot/1.0)",
277	        "Accept": "text/html",
278	    }
279	    resp = await _pinned_preview_get(client, url, _og_headers)
280	    if resp is None:
281	        return None
282	    if resp.is_redirect:
283	        location = resp.headers.get("location", "")
284	        if not location:
285	            return None
286	        location = urljoin(url, location)
287	        resp = await _pinned_preview_get(client, location, _og_headers)
288	        if resp is None:
289	            return None
290	    if resp.status_code != 200:
291	        return None
292	    cl = resp.headers.get("content-length")
293	    if cl and cl.isdigit() and int(cl) > 1_000_000:
294	        return None
295	    ct = resp.headers.get("content-type", "")
296	    if "text/html" not in ct and "application/xhtml" not in ct:
297	        return None
298	    body = resp.text
299	    head_end = body.find("</head>")
300	    if head_end > 0:
301	        body = body[:head_end]
302	    else:
303	        body = body[:100000]
304	    og = {}
305	    for m in _OG_RE.finditer(body):
306	        og.setdefault(m.group(1).lower(), m.group(2))
307	    for m in _OG_RE2.finditer(body):
308	        og.setdefault(m.group(2).lower(), m.group(1))
309	    title = og.get("title", "")
310	    if not title:
311	        tm = _TITLE_RE.search(body)
312	        title = tm.group(1).strip() if tm else ""
313	    if not title:
314	        return None
315	    description = og.get("description", "")
316	    if not description:
317	        dm = _DESC_RE.search(body)
318	        description = dm.group(1).strip() if dm else ""
319	    image = og.get("image", "")
320	    if image and image.startswith("/"):
321	        parsed = urlparse(url)
322	        image = f"{parsed.scheme}://{parsed.netloc}{image}"
323	    domain = og.get("site_name", "") or urlparse(url).netloc
324	    return {
325	        "url": url,
326	        "title": title[:200],
327	        "description": description[:300],
328	        "image": image,
329	        "domain": domain,
330	    }

333	def _get_room_notification_targets(db, room_id: str, sender_id: str) -> list[str]:
334	    room = get_room(db, room_id)
335	    if not room:
336	        return []
337	    room_type = room["type"]
338	    if room_type == "dm":
339	        rows = db.execute(
340	            "SELECT user_id FROM dm_participants WHERE room_id = ? AND user_id != ?",
341	            (room_id, sender_id),
342	        ).fetchall()
343	        return [
344	            r["user_id"] for r in rows if not is_blocked(db, r["user_id"], sender_id)
345	        ]
346	    elif room_type == "meetup":
347	        rows = db.execute(
348	            "SELECT user_id FROM meetup_attendees WHERE meetup_id = ? AND user_id != ?",
349	            (room_id, sender_id),
350	        ).fetchall()
351	        return [
352	            r["user_id"] for r in rows if not is_blocked(db, r["user_id"], sender_id)
353	        ]
354	    else:
355	        rows = db.execute(
356	            "SELECT user_id FROM room_memberships WHERE room_id = ? AND user_id != ?",

358	        ).fetchall()
359	        return [

364	_push_debounce: dict[str, float] = {}
365	_push_sent: dict[str, bool] = {}
366	_push_flush_tasks: dict[str, asyncio.Task] = {}
367	_push_counter: int = 0
368	
369	
370	async def _push_or_defer(
371	    user_id: str,
372	    room_id: str,
373	    room_type: str,
374	    room_name: str,
375	    sender_name: str,
376	    text_preview: str,
377	    msg_id: str | None = None,
378	) -> None:
379	    global _push_counter
380	    key = f"{user_id}:{room_id}"
381	    now = time.monotonic()
382	    last = _push_debounce.get(key, 0)
383	    if now - last > 1800:
384	        _push_sent.pop(key, None)
385	    window = 60 if _push_sent.get(key) else 10
386	    if now - last < window:
387	        if key not in _push_flush_tasks:
388	            delay = last + window - now
389	            _push_flush_tasks[key] = asyncio.create_task(
390	                _flush_push_later(key, delay, user_id, room_id, room_type, room_name)
391	            )
392	        return
393	    _push_debounce[key] = now
394	    silent = bool(_push_sent.get(key))
395	    _push_counter += 1
396	    sent = await _do_send_push(
397	        user_id,
398	        room_id,
399	        room_type,
400	        room_name,
401	        sender_name,
402	        text_preview,
403	        msg_id,
404	        silent=silent,
405	        push_index=_push_counter,
406	    )
407	    # Only escalate to silent follow-ups after a push actually went out.
408	    # Marking before the send poisoned the flag when the user had no
409	    # subscription yet: their first real push then arrived silent.
410	    if sent:
411	        _push_sent[key] = True
412	
413	
414	async def _flush_push_later(
415	    key: str,
416	    delay: float,
417	    user_id: str,
418	    room_id: str,
419	    room_type: str,
420	    room_name: str,
421	) -> None:
422	    await asyncio.sleep(delay)
423	    _push_flush_tasks.pop(key, None)
424	    await _push_or_defer(user_id, room_id, room_type, room_name, "", "", None)
425	
426	
427	async def _do_send_push(
428	    user_id: str,
429	    room_id: str,
430	    room_type: str,
431	    room_name: str,
432	    sender_name: str,
433	    text_preview: str,
434	    msg_id: str | None,
435	    silent: bool,
436	    push_index: int,
437	) -> bool:
438	    db = get_chat_db()
439	    try:
440	        subs = get_push_subscriptions(db, user_id)
441	        if not subs:
442	            return False
443	        counts = get_unread_counts(db, user_id)
444	        room_counts = counts.get(room_id)
445	        count = room_counts["count"] if room_counts else 0
446	        total_unread = sum(c["count"] for c in counts.values())
447	        if count == 0:
448	            return False
449	        last_read = room_counts["last_read_at"] if room_counts else "1970-01-01"
450	        now_iso = datetime.now(timezone.utc).isoformat()
451	        row = db.execute(
452	            "SELECT id FROM messages WHERE room_id = ? AND created_at > ? "
453	            "AND user_id != ? AND expires_at > ? ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 1",
454	            (room_id, last_read, user_id, now_iso),
455	        ).fetchone()
456	        first_msg_id = row["id"] if row else msg_id
457	        if not sender_name:
458	            msg_row = db.execute(
459	                "SELECT m.content, u.display_name, u.username FROM messages m "
460	                "JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id "
461	                "WHERE m.room_id = ? AND m.created_at > ? AND m.user_id != ? AND m.expires_at > ? "
462	                "ORDER BY m.created_at DESC LIMIT 1",
463	                (room_id, last_read, user_id, now_iso),
464	            ).fetchone()
465	            if msg_row:
466	                sender_name = msg_row["display_name"] or msg_row["username"]
467	                if count == 1:
468	                    if room_type == "dm":
469	                        _, text_preview = _dm_preview(sender_name)
470	                    else:
471	                        text_preview = msg_row["content"] or ""
472	    finally:
473	        db.close()
474	
475	    vapid_private_key = os.environ.get("VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY")
476	    if not vapid_private_key:
477	        return False
478	    if "BEGIN" not in vapid_private_key and not os.path.isfile(vapid_private_key):
479	        logger.warning("VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY file not found: %s", vapid_private_key)
480	        return False
481	
482	    if count == 1:
483	        if room_type == "dm":
484	            title = sender_name
485	            body = text_preview[:100]
486	        elif room_type == "meetup":
487	            title = room_name
488	            body = f"{sender_name}: {text_preview[:80]}"
489	        else:
490	            title = f"#{room_name}"
491	            body = f"{sender_name}: {text_preview[:80]}"
492	    else:
493	        if room_type == "dm":
494	            title = sender_name
495	        elif room_type == "meetup":
496	            title = room_name
497	        else:
498	            title = f"#{room_name}"
499	        body = f"{count} new messages"
500	
501	    url = f"/chat/msg/{first_msg_id}" if first_msg_id else f"/chat/r/{room_id}"
502	    payload = json.dumps(
503	        {
504	            "title": title,
505	            "body": body,
506	            "room_id": room_id,
507	            "room_type": room_type,
508	            "count": count,
509	            "total_unread": total_unread,
510	            "url": url,
511	            "silent": silent,
512	            "push_index": push_index,
513	            # push_index resets to 0 on every server restart, so it alone can
514	            # collide with a still-visible notification's tag and cause iOS to
515	            # silently drop notificationclick on the replaced notification.
516	            "push_id": secrets.token_hex(8),
517	        }
518	    )
519	
520	    vapid_claims = {
521	        "sub": os.environ.get("VAPID_CLAIMS_EMAIL", "mailto:noreply@example.com")
522	    }
523	    try:
524	        from pywebpush import webpush, WebPushException
525	    except ImportError:
526	        logger.warning("pywebpush not installed, skipping chat push")
527	        return False
528	    sent_any = False
529	    for sub in subs:
530	        try:
531	            await asyncio.to_thread(
532	                webpush,
533	                subscription_info={
534	                    "endpoint": sub["endpoint"],
535	                    "keys": {"p256dh": sub["p256dh"], "auth": sub["auth"]},
536	                },
537	                data=payload,
538	                vapid_private_key=vapid_private_key,
539	                # Fresh copy per endpoint: pywebpush mutates the claims dict,
540	                # stamping the FIRST endpoint's origin as `aud` -- a shared
541	                # dict poisons every later push to a different push service
542	                # (FCM rejects an apple aud with 403; mixed-service users
543	                # only ever reached the first service).
544	                vapid_claims=dict(vapid_claims),
545	                # pywebpush defaults to TTL=0 ("deliver this instant or
546	                # discard") -- any momentary push-service disconnect on the
547	                # client (Brave's GCM socket idles aggressively) silently
548	                # drops the push. Let the service hold it for 5 minutes.
549	                ttl=300,
550	                timeout=10,
551	            )
552	            sent_any = True
553	        except WebPushException as e:
554	            if (
555	                hasattr(e, "response")
556	                and e.response is not None
557	                and e.response.status_code in (404, 410)
558	            ):
559	                cleanup_db = get_chat_db()
560	                delete_push_subscription_by_endpoint(cleanup_db, sub["endpoint"])
561	                cleanup_db.close()
562	            else:
563	                logger.warning("Chat push failed for %s: %s", sub["endpoint"][:60], e)
564	        except Exception:
565	            logger.exception("Unexpected push error")
566	    return sent_any

569	class ChatRoom:
570	    def __init__(self):
571	        self.connections: dict[str, WebSocket] = {}
572	        self.conn_users: dict[str, str] = {}
573	        self.user_names: dict[str, str] = {}
574	        self.user_info: dict[str, dict] = {}
575	
576	    async def broadcast(self, event: dict, exclude_conn: str | None = None) -> None:
577	        payload = json.dumps(event)
578	        disconnected = []
579	        for conn_id, ws in list(self.connections.items()):
580	            if conn_id == exclude_conn:
581	                continue
582	            try:
583	                await ws.send_text(payload)
584	            except Exception:
585	                disconnected.append(conn_id)
586	        for cid in disconnected:
587	            uid = self.conn_users.pop(cid, None)
588	            self.connections.pop(cid, None)
589	            if uid and not any(u == uid for u in self.conn_users.values()):
590	                self.user_names.pop(uid, None)
591	                self.user_info.pop(uid, None)
592	
593	
594	class ConnectionManager:
595	    def __init__(self):
596	        self.rooms: dict[str, ChatRoom] = {}
597	        self.user_conns: dict[str, dict[str, WebSocket]] = {}
598	        self.conn_user: dict[str, str] = {}
599	        self.user_rooms: dict[str, set[str]] = {}
600	        self._rate_buckets: dict[str, list[float]] = {}
601	        self._broadcast_buckets: dict[str, list[float]] = {}
602	        self.user_badge_rooms: dict[str, set[str]] = {}
603	        self.user_unread: dict[str, dict[str, int]] = {}
604	        self._room_meta: dict[str, dict] = {}
605	        self._recent_msgs: dict[str, list] = {}
606	        self._last_active_ts: dict[str, float] = {}
607	        self._last_ws_activity: dict[str, float] = {}
608	
609	    def should_update_last_active(self, user_id: str, interval: float = 60.0) -> bool:
610	        now = time.monotonic()
611	        last = self._last_active_ts.get(user_id, 0)
612	        if now - last >= interval:
613	            self._last_active_ts[user_id] = now
614	            return True
615	        return False
616	
617	    def _get_room(self, room_id: str) -> ChatRoom:
618	        if room_id not in self.rooms:
619	            self.rooms[room_id] = ChatRoom()
620	        return self.rooms[room_id]
621	
622	    async def connect(self, ws: WebSocket, user_id: str, conn_id: str) -> None:
623	        self.user_conns.setdefault(user_id, {})[conn_id] = ws
624	        self.conn_user[conn_id] = user_id
625	        self.user_rooms.setdefault(user_id, set())
626	        self._last_ws_activity[user_id] = time.monotonic()
627	
628	    def disconnect(self, conn_id: str) -> tuple[str | None, set[str]]:
629	        user_id = self.conn_user.pop(conn_id, None)
630	        if not user_id:
631	            return None, set()
632	        conns = self.user_conns.get(user_id, {})
633	        conns.pop(conn_id, None)
634	        for room_id in list(self.user_rooms.get(user_id, set())):
635	            room = self.rooms.get(room_id)
636	            if room:
637	                room.connections.pop(conn_id, None)
638	                room.conn_users.pop(conn_id, None)
639	        if not conns:
640	            self.user_conns.pop(user_id, None)
641	            rooms = self.user_rooms.pop(user_id, set())
642	            self.user_badge_rooms.pop(user_id, None)
643	            self.user_unread.pop(user_id, None)
644	            self._rate_buckets.pop(user_id, None)
645	            self._broadcast_buckets.pop(user_id, None)
646	            self._recent_msgs.pop(user_id, None)
647	            self._last_active_ts.pop(user_id, None)
648	            for room_id in rooms:
649	                room = self.rooms.get(room_id)
650	                if room and not any(u == user_id for u in room.conn_users.values()):
651	                    room.user_names.pop(user_id, None)
652	                    room.user_info.pop(user_id, None)
653	            return user_id, rooms
654	        return user_id, set()
655	
656	    async def join_room(
657	        self,
658	        room_id: str,
659	        user_id: str,
660	        conn_id: str,
661	        display_name: str,
662	        username: str = "",
663	        color_index: int = 0,
664	        avatar_url: str = "",
665	        country: str = "",
666	    ) -> None:
667	        room = self._get_room(room_id)
668	        ws = self.user_conns.get(user_id, {}).get(conn_id)
669	        if not ws:
670	            return
671	        already_in_room = any(u == user_id for u in room.conn_users.values())
672	        room.connections[conn_id] = ws
673	        room.conn_users[conn_id] = user_id
674	        room.user_names[user_id] = display_name
675	        room.user_info[user_id] = {
676	            "display_name": display_name,
677	            "username": username,
678	            "color_index": color_index,
679	            "avatar_url": avatar_url,
680	            "country": country,
681	        }
682	        self.user_rooms.setdefault(user_id, set()).add(room_id)
683	        if not already_in_room:
684	            await room.broadcast(
685	                {
686	                    "event": "presence",
687	                    "room_id": room_id,
688	                    "user_id": user_id,
689	                    "display_name": display_name,
690	                    "username": username,
691	                    "color_index": color_index,
692	                    "avatar_url": avatar_url,
693	                    "country": country,
694	                    "online": True,
695	                },
696	                exclude_conn=conn_id,
697	            )
698	
699	    async def leave_room(self, room_id: str, conn_id: str) -> None:
700	        room = self.rooms.get(room_id)
701	        if not room:
702	            return
703	        user_id = room.conn_users.pop(conn_id, None)
704	        room.connections.pop(conn_id, None)
705	        if user_id and not any(u == user_id for u in room.conn_users.values()):
706	            room.user_names.pop(user_id, None)
707	            room.user_info.pop(user_id, None)
708	            await room.broadcast(
709	                {
710	                    "event": "presence",
711	                    "room_id": room_id,
712	                    "user_id": user_id,
713	                    "online": False,
714	                },
715	            )
716	        rooms = self.user_rooms.get(user_id or "")
717	        if rooms:
718	            rooms.discard(room_id)
719	
720	    async def broadcast_to_room(
721	        self,
722	        room_id: str,
723	        event: dict,
724	        exclude_conn: str | None = None,
725	    ) -> None:
726	        room = self.rooms.get(room_id)
727	        if room:
728	            await room.broadcast(event, exclude_conn=exclude_conn)
729	
730	    async def broadcast_profile_update(self, user_id: str, identity: dict) -> None:
731	        # Called when a user edits their profile: refresh the cached identity in
732	        # every room they're in and tell connected peers so already-rendered
733	        # messages and the member list update without a reconnect.
734	        for room_id in list(self.user_rooms.get(user_id, set())):
735	            room = self.rooms.get(room_id)
736	            if room and user_id in room.user_info:
737	                room.user_info[user_id].update(identity)
738	                if identity.get("display_name"):
739	                    room.user_names[user_id] = identity["display_name"]
740	            await self.broadcast_to_room(
741	                room_id,
742	                {"event": "profile_updated", "user_id": user_id, **identity},
743	            )
744	
745	    async def send_to_user(self, user_id: str, event: dict) -> None:
746	        conns = self.user_conns.get(user_id, {})
747	        payload = json.dumps(event)
748	        for ws in list(conns.values()):
749	            try:
750	                await ws.send_text(payload)
751	            except Exception:
752	                pass
753	
754	    async def broadcast_to_all(self, event: dict) -> None:
755	        payload = json.dumps(event)
756	        for conns in list(self.user_conns.values()):
757	            for ws in list(conns.values()):
758	                try:
759	                    await ws.send_text(payload)
760	                except Exception:
761	                    pass
762	
763	    def get_online_users(self, room_id: str) -> list[dict]:
764	        room = self.rooms.get(room_id)
765	        if not room:
766	            return []
767	        return [
768	            {"user_id": uid, **room.user_info.get(uid, {"display_name": name})}
769	            for uid, name in room.user_names.items()
770	        ]
771	
772	    def check_rate_limit(
773	        self, user_id: str, max_msgs: int = 10, window_secs: int = 10
774	    ) -> bool:
775	        now = time.monotonic()
776	        bucket = self._rate_buckets.setdefault(user_id, [])
777	        bucket[:] = [t for t in bucket if now - t < window_secs]
778	        if len(bucket) >= max_msgs:
779	            return False
780	        bucket.append(now)
781	        return True
782	
783	    def check_broadcast_rate(
784	        self, user_id: str, max_events: int = 30, window_secs: int = 10
785	    ) -> bool:
786	        # Separate, lenient bucket for high-frequency room fan-out events
787	        # (typing, reactions, join/leave) so they can't be spammed into a
788	        # broadcast-storm DoS, without consuming the send-message budget.
789	        now = time.monotonic()
790	        bucket = self._broadcast_buckets.setdefault(user_id, [])
791	        bucket[:] = [t for t in bucket if now - t < window_secs]
792	        if len(bucket) >= max_events:
793	            return False
794	        bucket.append(now)
795	        return True
796	
797	    def check_duplicate(self, user_id: str, text: str, window_secs: int = 120) -> bool:
798	        if len(text) <= 4:
799	            return False
800	        now = time.monotonic()
801	        history = self._recent_msgs.get(user_id, [])
802	        history[:] = [(t, msg) for t, msg in history if now - t < window_secs]
803	        normalized = text.strip().lower()
804	        is_dup = any(msg == normalized for _, msg in history[-3:])
805	        history.append((now, normalized))
806	        self._recent_msgs[user_id] = history
807	        return is_dup

813	def _build_reply_snippet(
814	    db, reply_to_id: str | None, room_id: str | None = None
815	) -> dict | None:
816	    if not reply_to_id:
817	        return None
818	    orig = db.execute(
819	        "SELECT m.content, m.type, u.display_name FROM messages m "
820	        "JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.id = ? AND (? IS NULL OR m.room_id = ?)",
821	        (reply_to_id, room_id, room_id),
822	    ).fetchone()
823	    if not orig:
824	        return None
825	    reply_text = ""
826	    if _is_e2ee_content(orig["content"]):
827	        reply_text = ""
828	    elif orig["type"] == "text":
829	        try:
830	            reply_text = json.loads(orig["content"]).get("text", "")[:80]
831	        except Exception:
832	            reply_text = orig["content"][:80]
833	    return {"id": reply_to_id, "display_name": orig["display_name"], "text": reply_text}

836	def _format_message_for_history(m, reactions_map: dict) -> dict:
837	    keys = m.keys()
838	    d = {
839	        "id": m["id"],
840	        "room_id": m["room_id"],
841	        "user_id": m["user_id"],
842	        "display_name": m["display_name"],
843	        "username": m["username"] if "username" in keys else "",
844	        "color_index": m["color_index"] if "color_index" in keys else 0,
845	        "avatar_url": m["avatar_url"] if "avatar_url" in keys else "",
846	        "type": m["type"],
847	        "content": m["content"],
848	        "created_at": m["created_at"],
849	    }
850	    if m["reply_to_id"] and m["reply_display_name"]:
851	        reply_text = ""
852	        if _is_e2ee_content(m["reply_content"]):
853	            reply_text = ""
854	        elif m["reply_type"] == "text":
855	            try:
856	                reply_text = json.loads(m["reply_content"]).get("text", "")[:80]
857	            except Exception:
858	                reply_text = (m["reply_content"] or "")[:80]
859	        d["reply_to"] = {
860	            "id": m["reply_to_id"],
861	            "display_name": m["reply_display_name"],
862	            "text": reply_text,
863	        }
864	    if m["id"] in reactions_map:
865	        d["reactions"] = reactions_map[m["id"]]
866	    lp = m["link_preview"] if "link_preview" in keys else None
867	    if lp:
868	        try:
869	            d["link_preview"] = json.loads(lp) if isinstance(lp, str) else lp
870	        except (json.JSONDecodeError, TypeError):
871	            pass
872	    return d

875	async def _moderate_and_broadcast(
876	    mgr,
877	    room_id,
878	    user_id,
879	    conn_id,
880	    display_name,
881	    username,
882	    color_index,
883	    avatar_url,
884	    msg,
885	    msg_type,
886	    content,
887	    text,
888	    image_url,
889	    reply_to_id,
890	    ws,
891	    is_moderated=True,
892	):
893	    logger.info("[MOD] len=%d is_moderated=%s", len(text or ""), is_moderated)
894	    db = get_chat_db()
895	    try:
896	        if is_moderated:
897	            mod_result = await moderate_message(db, user_id, text, image_url)
898	            logger.info("[MOD] result: %s", mod_result)
899	        else:
900	            mod_result = {"allowed": True}
901	
902	        if not mod_result["allowed"]:
903	            if msg_type in ("image", "video"):
904	                try:
905	                    _u = msg.get("media_url") or json.loads(content).get("url", "")
906	                    if _u:
907	                        _fn = _u.rsplit("/", 1)[-1]
908	                        _stem = _fn.rsplit(".", 1)[0]
909	                        (_UPLOADS_DIR / _fn).unlink(missing_ok=True)
910	                        (_UPLOADS_DIR / f"{_stem}_mod.webp").unlink(missing_ok=True)
911	                        for _i in range(3):
912	                            (_UPLOADS_DIR / f"{_stem}_mod{_i}.webp").unlink(
913	                                missing_ok=True
914	                            )
915	                except Exception:
916	                    pass
917	            db.execute("DELETE FROM messages WHERE id = ?", (msg["id"],))
918	            db.commit()
919	            await mgr.send_to_user(
920	                user_id,
921	                {
922	                    "event": "message_removed",
923	                    "id": msg["id"],
924	                    "room_id": room_id,
925	                    "reason": mod_result["reason"],
926	                },
927	            )
928	            if mod_result["action"] in ("ban", "mute"):
929	                removed = delete_user_messages(db, user_id)
930	                for batch in removed:
931	                    await mgr.broadcast_to_room(
932	                        batch["room_id"],
933	                        {
934	                            "event": "messages_expired",
935	                            "room_id": batch["room_id"],
936	                            "message_ids": batch["message_ids"],
937	                        },
938	                    )
939	            if mod_result["action"] == "ban":
940	                await mgr.send_to_user(
941	                    user_id, {"event": "banned", "reason": mod_result["reason"]}
942	                )
943	                try:
944	                    await ws.close(code=4003, reason="Banned")
945	                except Exception:
946	                    pass
947	            elif mod_result["action"] == "mute":
948	                await mgr.send_to_user(
949	                    user_id,
950	                    {
951	                        "event": "muted",
952	                        "reason": mod_result["reason"],
953	                        "message": mod_result.get("message", ""),
954	                    },
955	                )
956	            elif mod_result.get("strike_count"):
957	                await mgr.send_to_user(
958	                    user_id,
959	                    {
960	                        "event": "strike",
961	                        "count": mod_result["strike_count"],
962	                        "reason": mod_result["reason"],
963	                    },
964	                )
965	            return
966	
967	        # Moderation passed: mark the message approved so room history serves
968	        # it (moderated messages start 'pending'; unmoderated are already
969	        # 'approved', so this is a no-op for them).
970	        db.execute(
971	            "UPDATE messages SET moderation_status = 'approved' WHERE id = ?",
972	            (msg["id"],),
973	        )
974	        db.commit()
975	
976	        # Re-fetch the sender's identity so a profile edit made after this
977	        # connection's handshake is reflected in the live broadcast, not the
978	        # frozen handshake values.
979	        sender = get_user(db, user_id)
980	        if sender:
981	            _sk = sender.keys()
982	            display_name = sender["display_name"]
983	            if "username" in _sk:
984	                username = sender["username"]
985	            if "color_index" in _sk:
986	                color_index = sender["color_index"]
987	            if "avatar_url" in _sk:
988	                avatar_url = sender["avatar_url"]
989	
990	        event_data = {
991	            "event": "message",
992	            "id": msg["id"],
993	            "room_id": room_id,
994	            "user_id": user_id,
995	            "display_name": display_name,
996	            "username": username,
997	            "color_index": color_index,
998	            "avatar_url": avatar_url,
999	            "type": msg_type,
1000	            "content": content,
1001	            "created_at": msg["created_at"],
1002	        }
1003	        reply_snippet = _build_reply_snippet(db, reply_to_id, room_id)
1004	        if reply_snippet:
1005	            event_data["reply_to"] = reply_snippet
1006	        await mgr.broadcast_to_room(room_id, event_data, exclude_conn=conn_id)
1007	
1008	        if msg_type == "text" and text and not _is_e2ee_content(content):
1009	            link_url = _extract_first_url(text)
1010	            if link_url:
1011	                preview = await _fetch_link_preview(link_url)
1012	                if preview:
1013	                    db.execute(
1014	                        "UPDATE messages SET link_preview = ? WHERE id = ?",
1015	                        (json.dumps(preview), msg["id"]),
1016	                    )
1017	                    db.commit()
1018	                    await mgr.broadcast_to_room(
1019	                        room_id,
1020	                        {
1021	                            "event": "link_preview",
1022	                            "message_id": msg["id"],
1023	                            "room_id": room_id,
1024	                            "link_preview": preview,
1025	                        },
1026	                    )
1027	
1028	        meta = mgr._room_meta.get(room_id, {"type": "general", "name": ""})
1029	
1030	        text_preview = ""
1031	        if msg_type == "text":
1032	            text_preview = (text or "")[:100]
1033	        elif msg_type == "image":
1034	            text_preview = "Sent a photo"
1035	        elif msg_type == "video":
1036	            text_preview = "Sent a video"
1037	        elif msg_type == "location":
1038	            text_preview = "Shared a location"
1039	        elif msg_type == "meetup_card":
1040	            text_preview = "Shared a meetup"
1041	
1042	        if meta.get("type") == "dm":
1043	            _, text_preview = _dm_preview(display_name)
1044	
1045	        # badge_update goes to EVERY member except the sender, including users
1046	        # with a connection currently viewing this room: viewing is a
1047	        # per-CONNECTION state the server cannot attribute (a second device in
1048	        # another room must still get its badge), so the foreground viewer's
1049	        # client ignores updates for its open room and mark_read broadcasts
1050	        # the cross-device clear.
1051	        for uid, badge_rooms in list(mgr.user_badge_rooms.items()):
1052	            if room_id not in badge_rooms or uid == user_id:
1053	                continue
1054	            unread = mgr.user_unread.setdefault(uid, {})
1055	            unread[room_id] = unread.get(room_id, 0) + 1
1056	            await mgr.send_to_user(
1057	                uid,
1058	                {
1059	                    "event": "badge_update",
1060	                    "room_id": room_id,
1061	                    "count": unread[room_id],
1062	                    "type": meta.get("type", "general"),
1063	                    "name": meta.get("name", ""),
1064	                    "sender_name": display_name,
1065	                    "preview": text_preview,
1066	                },
1067	            )
1068	
1069	        connected_uids = set(mgr.user_conns.keys())
1070	        all_targets = _get_room_notification_targets(db, room_id, user_id)
1071	        now = time.monotonic()
1072	        push_targets = [
1073	            uid
1074	            for uid in all_targets
1075	            if uid not in connected_uids or now - mgr._last_ws_activity.get(uid, 0) > 30
1076	        ]
1077	        logger.info(
1078	            "[PUSH] targets=%d all=%d connected=%d sender=%s",
1079	            len(push_targets),
1080	            len(all_targets),
1081	            len(connected_uids),
1082	            user_id[:8],
1083	        )
1084	        room_type = meta.get("type", "general")
1085	        room_name = meta.get("name", "")
1086	        for uid in push_targets:
1087	            asyncio.create_task(
1088	                _push_or_defer(
1089	                    uid,
1090	                    room_id,
1091	                    room_type,
1092	                    room_name,
1093	                    display_name,
1094	                    text_preview,
1095	                    msg_id=msg["id"],
1096	                )
1097	            )
1098	
1099	    except Exception:
1100	        logger.exception("Moderation task error for message %s", msg["id"])
1101	        try:
1102	            db.execute("DELETE FROM messages WHERE id = ?", (msg["id"],))
1103	            db.commit()
1104	        except Exception:
1105	            pass
1106	        await mgr.send_to_user(
1107	            user_id,
1108	            {
1109	                "event": "message_removed",
1110	                "id": msg["id"],
1111	                "room_id": room_id,
1112	                "reason": "Message could not be verified. Please try again.",
1113	            },
1114	        )
1115	    finally:
1116	        db.close()
1117	        if msg_type in ("image", "video"):
1118	            try:
1119	                rel_url = json.loads(content).get("url", "")
1120	                stem = rel_url.rsplit("/", 1)[-1].rsplit(".", 1)[0]
1121	                if stem:
1122	                    for suffix in (
1123	                        "_mod.webp",
1124	                        "_mod0.webp",
1125	                        "_mod1.webp",
1126	                        "_mod2.webp",
1127	                    ):
1128	                        p = _UPLOADS_DIR / f"{stem}{suffix}"
1129	                        p.unlink(missing_ok=True)
1130	            except Exception:
1131	                pass

1138	async def handle_chat_ws(ws: WebSocket, token: str, event_id: str) -> None:
1139	    db = get_chat_db()
1140	    user = get_user_by_token(db, token)
1141	    if not user:
1142	        db.close()
1143	        await ws.close(code=4001, reason="Invalid session")
1144	        return
1145	
1146	    await ws.accept()
1147	    try:
1148	        msg_char_limit = int(get_setting(db, "msg_char_limit", "1000"))
1149	    except (ValueError, TypeError):
1150	        msg_char_limit = 1000
1151	    user_id = user["id"]
1152	    conn_id = secrets.token_hex(8)
1153	    display_name = user["display_name"]
1154	    ukeys = user.keys()
1155	    username = user["username"] if "username" in ukeys else ""
1156	    color_index = user["color_index"] if "color_index" in ukeys else 0
1157	    avatar_url = user["avatar_url"] if "avatar_url" in ukeys else ""
1158	    country = user["country"] if "country" in ukeys else ""
1159	    await manager.connect(ws, user_id, conn_id)
1160	    update_last_seen(db, user_id)
1161	
1162	    memberships = get_user_memberships(db, user_id)
1163	    dm_rooms = db.execute(
1164	        "SELECT room_id FROM dm_participants WHERE user_id = ?", (user_id,)
1165	    ).fetchall()
1166	    manager.user_badge_rooms[user_id] = {m["room_id"] for m in memberships} | {
